businesses.name: Market Square Cafe
businesses.description: Cozy corner cafe in historic Market Square serving single-origin coffee, fresh-baked scones, and seasonal pastries.

deal.title: Free pastry with any large coffee
deal.description: Show this code at the register to get a free pastry of the day with the purchase of any large coffee. One per customer per visit.

businesses.name: Deerpath Books & Gifts
businesses.description: Independent bookshop with hand-picked staff favorites, a children's reading nook, and locally made gifts.

deal.title: 15% off any one book
deal.description: Take 15% off any single book in store. Cannot be combined with other offers or applied to gift cards.

businesses.name: Western & Thread Boutique
businesses.address: 654 N Western Ave, Lake Forest, IL 60045
businesses.description: Curated women's clothing and accessories from independent designers, with seasonal trunk shows.

deal.title: $20 off purchases of $100+
deal.description: Spend $100 or more and take $20 off your total. Valid on regular-priced items only.

businesses.name: Bank Lane Bistro
businesses.description: Farm-to-table American bistro with a rotating seasonal menu and a quiet patio off Market Square.

deal.title: Complimentary dessert with two entrees
deal.description: Order two entrees and receive one complimentary dessert to share. Dine-in only, after 5pm.

businesses.name: Forest Greens Juice Bar
businesses.address: 920 S Waukegan Rd, Lake Forest, IL 60045
businesses.description: Cold-pressed juices, smoothie bowls, and grab-and-go salads made fresh every morning.

deal.title: Buy one smoothie, get one half off
deal.description: Buy any smoothie and get a second of equal or lesser value at half price. Valid weekdays before noon.

businesses.name: Telegraph Tune-Up Auto
businesses.address: 1450 S Telegraph Rd, Lake Forest, IL 60045
businesses.description: Family-owned auto repair and maintenance shop trusted for honest estimates and quick turnarounds.

deal.title: $15 off any oil change
deal.description: Present this code for $15 off a standard or synthetic oil change. One per vehicle per visit.

businesses.name: Westleigh Wellness Spa
businesses.description: Day spa offering massage, facials, and skincare treatments in a calm, modern setting.

deal.title: 20% off your first facial
deal.description: New clients receive 20% off any facial treatment. Booking required; mention code when scheduling.

businesses.name: Everett Road Fitness
businesses.address: 300 W Everett Rd, Lake Forest, IL 60045
businesses.description: Boutique gym with strength equipment, small-group classes, and personal training.

deal.title: One free week trial pass
deal.description: Enjoy seven days of full gym and class access at no cost. New members only, one per person.

businesses.name: Lakeside Pizza Co.

deal.title: Free order of garlic knots with any large pizza
deal.description: Add a free order of garlic knots when you buy any large pizza. Carryout and dine-in.

businesses.name: Deerpath Family Dental
businesses.description: Gentle family and cosmetic dentistry with same-week appointments and modern equipment.

deal.title: $49 new-patient cleaning & exam
deal.description: New patients receive a cleaning, exam, and x-rays for $49. Excludes additional treatment.

businesses.name: Market Square Toy Shop
businesses.description: Classic toy store with puzzles, games, and educational toys plus free gift wrapping.

deal.title: Buy two games, get one 50% off
deal.description: Purchase two board games and take 50% off a third of equal or lesser value.

deal.title: 20% off your first dry-cleaning order
deal.description: First-time customers save 20% on any dry-cleaning order. Excludes alterations.

businesses.name: Willow Lane Bakery
businesses.address: 133 E Wisconsin Ave, Lake Forest, IL 60045

deal.title: Free loaf of sourdough with $25 purchase

businesses.name: Lake Forest Flower Studio
businesses.description: Boutique florist creating seasonal arrangements, wedding florals, and same-day local delivery.

deal.title: 10% off any arrangement

businesses.name: Scoops Creamery
businesses.description: Handmade ice cream and sorbet in rotating flavors, with dairy-free and sugar-free options.

deal.title: Free topping on any sundae
deal.description: Add any one topping to your sundae for free. One per customer per visit.

businesses.name: Ridge Road Hardware
businesses.address: 880 N Ridge Rd, Lake Forest, IL 60045

deal.description: Spend $50 or more and take $10 off your total. Excludes power tools and grills.

deal.title: First class free
deal.description: Your first drop-in class is on us. New students only; reserve a spot in advance.
